articles.description: This whole episode is a GREAT reminder of the GOLDEN RULE: not your keys, not your crypto! It's always the safe bet to store your own coins on a hardware wallet. articles.description: The chief executive of FTX is revealing why the crypto exchange passed on funding Elon Musk’s acquisition of social media giant Twitter. articles.title: Aptos Airdrop Season Is Coming. Here’s How You Can Profit
articles.description: In crypto, new network launches are typically followed by airdrop seasons. These "seasons" are periods when all the new projects that have successfully built applications on the network's testnet get ready to launch them on mainnet.
